zh.lifeSummary: 當Rachel Rice於1664年5月10日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可素德波利時，她的父親Henry Rice44歲，母親Elizabeth Moore36歲。她於1687年12月15日與Thomas Drury在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可素德波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1730年5月在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可福拉米加姆享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rachel Rice于1664年5月10日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可素德波利时，她的父亲Henry Rice44岁，母亲Elizabeth Moore36岁。她于1687年12月15日与Thomas Drury在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可素德波利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1730年5月在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可福拉米加姆享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized pronunciation of one of the most common Welsh personal names, Rhys, from a form originally meaning ‘rash, impetuous’, also spelled Rys and Re(e)s. See also Reese , with which it is interchangeable as a result of different Anglicized forms of the Welsh vowel y, and also compare Preece and Price . Initial R- in Welsh is voiceless and often spelled Rh-, but in English R- is voiced as in the Anglicized surnames Rees and Rice. Welsh y is a short back vowel /ɪ/. In the medieval period the English approximation of this vowel was either /i/ or /e/, lengthened to /i:/ and /e:/. Subsequent sound changes in English produced the alternative pronunciations represented in Rees, Preece and Rice, Price. The name has also been established in Ireland from an early date.

English: either a topographic name for someone who lived in or near a thicket (Middle English ris, rice, ris, from Old English hrīs, Old Norse hrís), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place called with this word, such as Rise (East Yorkshire).

English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English Rys(e) and Re(e)s which when without a preposition could derive from one or other of several Old French and Middle English words, including Anglo-Norman French ris ‘laughter, smile’, Middle English ris, res ‘stem, stalk’, in origin the same word as in 2 above, and Middle English ris, rise, rice, res, Old French ris, riz ‘rice’, perhaps a nickname for a rice dealer or a cook.

variants.name: Reese
meanings: North German and Dutch (De Reese): nickname for a very big man, from Middle Low German, Middle Dutch rese ‘giant’.
German: habitational name from any of the places called Rees or Reese, in Rhineland and Lower Saxony.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

variants.name: Ryce
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Rice  .

variants.name: Rise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Aase, Lief, Sven.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of over twenty farmsteads named Rise, from Old Norse hrís ‘brushwood’. The name also occurs in Sweden and Denmark.

variants.name: Wrice
meanings: Probably Welsh or English: variant of   Rice  .

nameMeanings.name: Rachel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘ewe’ in Hebrew), borne by the beloved wife of Jacob and mother (after long barrenness) of Joseph (Genesis 28–35) and of Benjamin, at whose birth she died. In the Middle Ages and subsequently this was regarded as a characteristically Jewish name, but it is now also popular among Gentiles.

variants.name: Rachelle
meanings: Elaborated form of   Rachel  , as if from French, but actually a recent coinage in English.

en.lifeSummary: When Rachel Rice was born on 10 May 1664, in Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Henry Rice, was 44 and her mother, Elizabeth Moore, was 36. She married Thomas Drury on 15 December 1687, in Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in May 1730, in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rachel Rice est née le 10 mai 1664, à Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Rice, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Moore, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Drury le 15 décembre 1687, à Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en mai 1730, à Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 66 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Rice è nata il il 10 maggio 1664 nel Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Henry Rice, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Moore, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Drury il 15 dicembre 1687, nel Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1730, nel Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rachel Riceが1664年5月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックススドブリーで生まれた時，父Henry Riceは44歳，母Elizabeth Mooreは36歳であった。1687年12月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックススドブリーでThomas Druryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1730年5月にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスフラミンガムで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rachel Rice(이)가 1664년 5월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 수드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Rice(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Moore(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1687년 12월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 수드버이에서 Thomas Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1730년 5월 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 프램잉함에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Rice nasceu em 10 de maio de 1664, em Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Rice, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Moore, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Drury em 15 de dezembro de 1687, em Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em maio de 1730, em Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rachel Rice родилась 10 мая 1664 г. в местности судбури, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Henry Rice было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Moore, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Drury 15 декабря 1687 г. в местности судбури, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла май 1730 г. в местности фрамингхам, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rachel Rice nació el 10 de mayo de 1664, en Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Henry Rice, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Moore, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Thomas Drury el 15 de diciembre de 1687, en Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1730, en Framingham, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 66 años.
